name: Cocktail Weiner Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sauce in a saucepan until well mixed.
2. Pour over the weiners in a crockpot and cook on low for 4 hours.
Author's Notes:
I boiled my little smokies in water for 2-3 minutes to reduce the amount of grease.
Difficulty: very easy
Precision: measure the ingredients
